selections.name: Alnair
selections.reason: Young progressive filly who broke her maiden impressively last start at Newcastle over 1 3/16m on a soft track. Looks primed to handle the step up in distance and carries a light weight.

selections.name: It Is To Be
selections.reason: Proven at this distance and excels on wet tracks. Won two starts back at Nowra over 1 3/8m on heavy going and will appreciate the drop in class from his recent Randwick run.

selections.name: Hardazhell
selections.reason: Consistent performer who handles wet conditions well. Finished a solid 4th over this track and trip last start and maps to get a favorable run.

selections.name: Koning
selections.reason: Drops significantly in grade from BM64 company. The 138lbs top weight is a concern on the soft track, but his class edge keeps him in the mix.

danger_horse.name: Tod
danger_horse.reason: Third-up and ready to peak. Has shown ability on soft ground and can make a statement here with fitness on his side.

selections.name: Red Rocquette
selections.reason: Showed excellent promise on debut when 4th at Nowra on a heavy track. Draws the inside barrier and looks ready to break through second-up.

selections.name: Lookin' Suave Harv
selections.reason: Put in a strong debut performance to finish 4th at Moruya on soft going. Will take plenty of benefit from that experience and is a major threat.

selections.name: Lady Got Bling
selections.reason: Resuming after a break but showed glimpses of ability last preparation. Can return on a positive note in this field.

selections.name: Nikita Zou
selections.reason: Drops sharply in class from a 2yo Open at Canberra. Has trialled well leading into this and could surprise at odds.

danger_horse.name: Ten Feathers
danger_horse.reason: Veteran maiden who occasionally pops up into the placings. Blinkers go on and could add value to exotics.

selections.name: The Diplomat
selections.reason: Takes a massive class drop from a Canterbury 2yo C&G Maiden. Showed early speed there before tiring and will find this country assignment much more to his liking.

selections.name: Mariana Miss
selections.reason: Resuming from a spell but has trialled exceptionally well, including a recent win. Ready to fire fresh.

selections.name: Cool Aza Breeze
selections.reason: Lightly raced filly from the elite Maher stable. Has been given plenty of trials to prepare for this resumption and commands respect.

selections.name: Bellagio Beach
selections.reason: Faded on debut at Kembla Grange but will strip fitter for the run. Drawn well to get a soft trip.

danger_horse.name: Nuns Chorus
danger_horse.reason: Ran on strongly from the back to grab 3rd at Gosford last start. Wide draw is tricky but has the closing speed to feature.

selections.name: Tennessee Dolly
selections.reason: Brings strong provincial form into this country benchmark race. Finished a close 4th at Newcastle last start and looks perfectly placed here despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Dancer's Delight
selections.reason: Progressive type resuming after breaking his maiden in good style last preparation. Has trialled well and can measure up immediately.

selections.name: Gem Tycoon
selections.reason: Lightly raced gelding who won his maiden before a spell. Now with the Freedman stable and has the upside to be highly competitive.

selections.name: Jukebox Flyer
selections.reason: Consistent mare who boxed on well for 2nd at Canberra last start. Gets a great draw and will be in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Casino Shaw
danger_horse.reason: Narrowly beaten into 2nd at Nowra last start on a wet track. Maps perfectly from barrier 3.

selections.name: Stormbringer
selections.reason: Takes a massive class drop from consecutive runs in Rosehill Highway company. Will find this country BM66 infinitely easier and is the one to beat.

selections.name: Anarita
selections.reason: Has been racing in stronger provincial company and handles wet tracks well. Drawn perfectly to get a soft run just behind the speed.

selections.name: Rubi Air
selections.reason: Proven wet tracker who won well at Sapphire Coast last start. Carries weight but is in top form.

selections.name: Clifton Springs
selections.reason: Solid provincial form lines including a respectable 6th at Hawkesbury last start. Capable of featuring in this grade.

danger_horse.name: Willingham
danger_horse.reason: Drops in grade from Canterbury BM64 company. Gets the inside draw and should appreciate the easier assignment.

selections.name: Feazabeel
selections.reason: Consistent gelding who handles wet tracks well. Finished a solid 3rd at Nowra last start and looks ready to break through in a winnable race.

selections.name: She Can Salsa
selections.reason: Put in a good run for 5th at Kembla Grange last start. Fitter now and the step up to the mile looks ideal.

selections.name: Capone
selections.reason: Brings strong provincial form, finishing 4th at Hawkesbury last start. The wide draw is a slight concern but has the class to overcome it.

selections.name: Rouladen
selections.reason: Showed marked improvement when 2nd at Nowra on a heavy track last start. Can go one better if he replicates that effort.

danger_horse.name: My Cartouche
danger_horse.reason: Has been racing in stronger provincial maidens. The wide draw makes it tough but she has the ability to figure in the finish.

selections.name: Olington Lane
selections.reason: In strong form and finished a close 3rd at Moruya last start. The wide draw is mitigated by the long chute at Goulburn, giving him time to settle.

selections.name: Brass Monkeys
selections.reason: Ran a great race to finish 2nd over 6f here last start. Steps up to 7f which should suit and draws perfectly.

selections.name: Spiritual Star
selections.reason: Had excuses last start but won well prior to that. Capable of bouncing back strongly in this field.

selections.name: Reckless Behaviour
selections.reason: Handles wet tracks well and will be rock-hard fit. Can run into the placings at decent odds.

danger_horse.name: Missile Defence
danger_horse.reason: Disappointed last start but his prior form was solid. Can bounce back if he handles the conditions.
